title: P4: responder context_3 still includes TH_3 after initiator fix
description: The context_3 construction in edhoc_responder_process_message_3 also uses TH_3 in the middle. Should be aligned for consistency with updated initiator and RFC. Discovered during codereview pass 1 of project-LICHEN-7sa7. tagged codereview
close_reason: Fixed context_3 in responder and aligned with initiator per RFC. Updated all TH_* computations to use proper compute_th with CIPHERTEXT_* and correct inputs. 3 codereview passes completed with all P4 findings addressed and fixed.
